name: @codemonster-ru/vue-ssg
description: Monorepo workspace for Codemonster SSG packages.

scripts.dev:template:default: npm run setup:template:default && npm run --prefix packages/create-vue-ssg/templates/default dev
scripts.dev:template:docs: npm run setup:template:docs && npm run --prefix packages/create-vue-ssg/templates/docs dev
scripts.build:template:default: npm run setup:template:default && npm run --prefix packages/create-vue-ssg/templates/default build
scripts.build:template:docs: npm run setup:template:docs && npm run --prefix packages/create-vue-ssg/templates/docs build
scripts.lint: npm run -w @codemonster-ru/ssg-demo lint && npm run -w @codemonster-ru/vue-ssg-core lint && npm run -w @codemonster-ru/create-vue-ssg lint
scripts.typecheck:packages: npm run -w @codemonster-ru/vue-ssg-core typecheck && npm run -w @codemonster-ru/create-vue-ssg typecheck
scripts.release:check: npm run typecheck:packages && npm run build:packages && npm run pack:core && npm run pack:create-vue-ssg
